title: Broken streetlight on Aleksandrovska
description: Streetlight has not been working for over two weeks, making the area unsafe at night.

title: Overflowing trash bins near Danube park
description: Bins are constantly overflowing, attracting stray animals and causing bad smell.

title: Potholes on main road to Druzhba
description: Large potholes causing damage to vehicles and traffic slowdowns.

title: Illegal dumping near industrial zone
description: Construction waste dumped illegally for several weeks.

title: Unsafe pedestrian crossing
description: Faded markings and no signage, cars do not stop.

title: Water leakage on sidewalk
description: Continuous leak causing slippery conditions and damage to pavement.

title: Playground equipment broken
description: Swings are damaged and unsafe for children.

title: Air pollution from factory emissions
description: Strong smell and visible smoke during evenings.

title: Blocked drainage causing flooding
description: Water accumulates after rain, blocking pedestrian access.

title: Lack of response to previous complaint
description: Reported issue 3 weeks ago with no update or acknowledgment.
